context.description: facts/clause/norm text for application & interpretation tasks

answer.description: gold answer: string for extraction/binary/choice; array of norm refs for norm_citation; array of terms for open

accept.description: alternative acceptable surface forms of the gold answer (extraction)

choices.description: options for multiple_choice (labelled A, B, C, ... in order)

gold_norm.description: provenance: source norm(s) a reviewer verifies via pravo.gov.ru

norm_text.description: verbatim statutory text of the governing norm — injected in --mode grounded (reasoning track)

distractor_text.description: plausible WRONG norm text — injected in --mode distractor (counterfactual-robustness probe)

temporal_text.description: OUTDATED/repealed version of the norm — injected in --mode temporal (temporal-validity probe; gold answer is current law)

explanation.description: why this answer is correct (for the reviewer, not the model)

volatile.description: true if gold depends on a value that changes often (amounts, rates)

last_checked.description: YYYY-MM-DD the gold was last verified against current law
